The pair sit down with Bloomberg Intelligence analyst Jonathan Palmer for a wide-ranging discussion of the firm’s operator-led approach to venture investing. title: Stocks Slide as US-Iran Jitters Drive Oil to $100: Markets Wrap
title_cn: 由于美国和伊朗的紧张情绪将油价推至 100 美元，股市下滑：市场收尾
summary: A surge in oil spurred by the escalating Iran war sent stocks and bonds lower, with Wall Street also rattled by renewed concerns over whether massive artificial-intelligence investments will pay off.

title: US Stocks Drop as Traders Focus on AI Spending, Oil Jumps
title_cn: 由于交易员关注人工智能支出、石油价格上涨，美国股市下跌
summary: US stocks retreated as worries about artificial-intelligence spending weighed on sentiment while oil prices hit $100 a barrel for the first time in two months. Traders braced for more key earnings, including from Intel Corp., later in the afternoon.

title: US Treasury Yields Rise to 2026 Highs With Oil Sparking Fed Bets
title_cn: 油价引发美联储押注，美国国债收益率升至 2026 年高位
summary: US Treasury yields rose to their highest levels of the year as the threat of escalation in the Iran war sent oil prices higher and boosted bets that the Federal Reserve could raise interest rates as soon as next week.

title: Mexican Mayor Shot Dead in his Office After Surviving Earlier Hit
title_cn: 墨西哥市长在早些时候的袭击中幸存后在办公室被枪杀
summary: Armed assailants gunned down the mayor of a small Mexican city just south of the country’s capital in his office, at least the 14th sitting city leader to be killed since President Claudia Sheinbaum took office in late 2024.

title: TotalEnergies Profit Jumps 68% as Wars Drive Refining Boom
title_cn: 战争推动炼油业繁荣，TotalEnergies 利润跃升 68%
summary: TotalEnergies SE said second-quarter earnings surged as conflict-related supply disruptions boosted prices for crude and refined products, offsetting a drop in profit from its gas business.

title: Cellnex Studies Strategic Options After Share Price Slump
title_cn: Cellnex 研究股价暴跌后的战略选择
summary: Cellnex Telecom SA is evaluating strategic options, according to people familiar with the matter, as the wireless tower operator looks at ways to grapple with its debt load and weak share price.

title: Latest Oil Market News and Analysis for July 23
title_cn: 7 月 23 日最新石油市场新闻和分析
summary: Oil topped $100 a barrel for the first time in two months after Iran-backed Houthi militants said they attacked two Saudi Arabian tankers in the Red Sea, escalating the Middle East conflict and threatening deeper supply disruptions.

title: BlackRock Says Focus on Credit Income in a Volatile Market
title_cn: 贝莱德表示在动荡的市场中关注信贷收入
summary: BlackRock Inc. is making the case for European corporate bonds even though their spread is close to the tightest on record.

title: Three Crude Supertankers Slip Out Through the Strait of Hormuz
title_cn: 三艘原油超级油轮通过霍尔木兹海峡溜出
summary: Three very large crude carriers hauling about 6 million barrels of crude slipped out of the Persian Gulf via the Strait of Hormuz in the past 24 hours, running the gauntlet of potential attack by Iran.

title: US Initial Jobless Claims Fall to Lowest Level Since 1969
title_cn: 美国首次申请失业救济人数降至 1969 年以来的最低水平
summary: First-time applications for US unemployment benefits fell last week to the lowest level since 1969, signaling layoffs remain muted in a stable labor market.

title: The Most Fundamental Macro Risk Is Back: MacroScope
title_cn: 最根本的宏观风险又回来了：MacroScope
summary: Rising inflation volatility is set to trigger earnings disappointments, wider credit spreads and more variability in stock and bond prices.

title: US Oil Exports Set for a Comeback as Renewed Iran Conflict Spurs Buyers
title_cn: 伊朗冲突重燃刺激买家，美国石油出口将卷土重来
summary: Further disruption to Middle East shipments prompts Asia and Europe to look elsewhere for supplies.

title: McCormick Will Add London Listing After Unilever Food Deal
title_cn: 联合利华食品交易后，味好美将在伦敦上市
summary: McCormick & Co. has picked London as a secondary listing location, just months after striking a deal to combine with Unilever Plc’s food business and in a blow to Amsterdam’s hopes.

title: BlackRock Says Treasury Yields Offer Buffer Against Losses
title_cn: 贝莱德称国债收益率为损失提供缓冲
summary: US Treasuries are offering investors solid protection against losses as yields remain elevated, according to BlackRock Inc.

title: India Seeks to Expand Investment Options for Portfolio Managers
title_cn: 印度寻求扩大投资组合经理的投资选择
summary: India’s markets regulator has proposed allowing portfolio managers to invest clients’ money in overseas securities and IPO-bound firms, as well as take unhedged equity derivatives positions, as part of a broader easing of rules for the industry.

title: Airtel Mobile-Money Unit Picks London for Listing Location
title_cn: Airtel 移动货币部门选择伦敦作为上市地点
summary: Airtel Africa Plc picked London as the primary listing location for its mobile-money business and expects to start trading there this year, confirming an earlier report by Bloomberg.

title: GCM Grosvenor Raises $1.2 Billion for Credit Secondaries Push
title_cn: GCM Grosvenor 筹集 12 亿美元用于信贷二级市场推广
summary: GCM Grosvenor has raised $1.2 billion for its first dedicated fund strategy targeting credit secondaries.

title: Crop Prices Hit 3-Year High as Black Sea Attacks, Heat Stoke Food Inflation
title_cn: 黑海袭击、热浪引发食品通胀，农作物价格创三年新高
summary: Crop prices rose to a three-year high as heat waves and escalating attacks in the Black Sea threatened to disrupt global grain trade, reviving risks to food inflation that have also been stoked by the war in Iran.

title: Alphabet’s Century Bond Has Now Lost a 10th of Its Face Value
title_cn: Alphabet 的世纪债券现已损失其面值的十分之一
summary: A 100-year bond that Alphabet Inc. issued earlier this year in the sterling market as it gorged on debt around the world has dropped below 90 pence on the pound for the first time.

title: Asian Oil Buyers in Talks to Reroute Saudi Red Sea Flows
title_cn: 亚洲石油买家正在商谈改变沙特红海航线
summary: Some Asian crude oil buyers are in talks with Saudi Aramco to potentially reroute flows around Africa after Houthi attacks on tankers in the Red Sea, according to traders familiar with the matter.

title: Alphabet Falls as $205 Billion Spending Plan Fuels AI Cost Fear
title_cn: 2050 亿美元支出计划加剧人工智能成本担忧，Alphabet 股价下跌
summary: Alphabet Inc. raised its capital spending forecast to as much as $205 billion this year, reigniting concerns about a lack of fiscal discipline in the race to dominate artificial intelligence.

title: Comcast Broadband Losses Counter Streaming, Media Gains
title_cn: 康卡斯特宽带亏损反流媒体，媒体盈利
summary: Comcast Corp. reported ongoing losses of cable-TV and broadband customers as it prepares to spin out its film and TV business, which is notching faster growth.

title: SK Hynix’s Arbitrage Trade Stymied by Strict Conversion Cap
title_cn: SK海力士的套利交易因严格的转换上限而受阻
summary: One of the world’s most enticing arbitrage opportunities will remain off limits.

title: Intel Needs More Than Blowout Earnings as Chips Rally Falters
title_cn: 随着芯片市场涨势疲软，英特尔需要的不仅仅是井喷式盈利
summary: Intel Corp. is expected to report strong second-quarter earnings after the market close ay, but even blowout results likely won’t be enough to reverse the stock’s July slide.

title: Infosys Taps Insider for CEO Role as Sales Outlook Tightens
title_cn: 随着销售前景趋紧，印孚瑟斯聘请内部人士担任首席执行官
summary: Infosys Ltd. trimmed the upper end of its sales forecast and named a new chief executive to lead it through a prolonged period of slower technology spending.

title: T-Mobile Revenue Misses Expectations as Customer Gains Slow
title_cn: 由于客户增长缓慢，T-Mobile 收入未达预期
summary: T-Mobile US Inc. reported revenue that missed analysts’ estimates amid modest gains in subscribers, disappointing Wall Street’s high expectations for the second-largest US mobile carrier.

title: South Africa Fund Plans $609 Million VC Raise With Exits Rising
title_cn: 南非基金计划筹集 6.09 亿美元风险投资，退出量增加
summary: A key South Africa fund plans to raise as much as 10 billion rand ($609 million) in venture capital to help scale high-growth startups, a move that would expand its technology sector and accelerate the development of one the continent’s most mature startup markets.

title: BT Profit Falls as Broadband, Voice Margins Offset Cuts
title_cn: 由于宽带、语音利润抵消削减，英国电信利润下降
summary: BT Group Plc reported a slight decline in profits for its fiscal first quarter, as lower margins in its broadband and voice businesses offset its cost-cutting efforts.

title: Google Says It Holds $94 Billion in SpaceX Shares After IPO
title_cn: 谷歌称其在 IPO 后持有 940 亿美元的 SpaceX 股票
summary: Alphabet Inc.’s Google said its equity holdings include $94.1 billion in SpaceX shares, after the space-and-AI company’s blockbuster initial public offering.

title: Google Fined €890 Million by EU Over Search, Play Store Breaches
title_cn: 谷歌因搜索、Play 商店违规被欧盟罚款 8.9 亿欧元
summary: Alphabet Inc.’s Google was fined a total of €890 million ($1 billion) by the European Union for violating the bloc’s Digital Markets Act, in a decision that risks further inflaming tensions with US President Donald Trump.

title: Keeping Kids Safe Online From AI Shows US and China on Different Paths
title_cn: 确保儿童上网安全免受人工智能侵害表明美国和中国走的是不同的道路
summary: China’s proactive approach to regulating AI and social media appears to be working

title: Tinder Brings In-Person Dating Events to More Cities in the US, Europe
title_cn: Tinder 将现场约会活动带到美国和欧洲更多城市
summary: Tinder is expanding its in-person singles events to new markets across the US and Europe following a successful test in Los Angeles that launched in March.

title: AI, Climate Change Are Creating a Perfect Storm for US Power Grids
title_cn: 人工智能、气候变化正在为美国电网掀起一场完美风暴
summary: A perfect storm is brewing for more grid emergencies and service disruptions.

title: STMicro Drops as Weak Forecast Eclipses Longer Term Outlook
title_cn: 由于疲软的预测掩盖了长期前景，意法半导体股价下跌
summary: STMicroelectronics NV plunged the most in a year after the chipmaker forecast third-quarter sales that missed analysts’ expectations, dimming hopes for a stronger recovery on the back of artificial intelligence data center demand.

title: Google Will Now Let Users Sign In to Accounts With a Selfie Video
title_cn: 谷歌现在将允许用户通过自拍视频登录帐户
summary: Google is adding a selfie video option as a new way to sign in to accounts, providing an alternative for users who may be locked out due to a lost device or forgotten password.

title: SpaceX Attempts Major Flight Test Again in Post-IPO Spotlight
title_cn: SpaceX 首次公开募股后再次尝试重大飞行测试
summary: SpaceX will again attempt a major test of its massive Starship rocket on Thursday after abandoning takeoff last week, exposing investors to the risks of the company’s rocky development cycle and heightening the stakes for the critical milestone.

title: Nokia’s Profit Beats Estimates as Data Centers Boost Growth
title_cn: 数据中心推动增长，诺基亚利润超出预期
summary: Nokia’s second-quarter profit strongly beat analysts’ forecasts, as the Finnish mobile network equipment maker’s push to supply gear to data centers propelled sales.

title: Absa Nears Tanzania Deal to Combine $3 Billion of Assets
title_cn: Absa 接近坦桑尼亚合并 30 亿美元资产的交易
summary: Absa Group Ltd. is nearing a deal to combine its banking interests in Tanzania as the lender looks to increase the scale of its East African businesses, according to people familiar with the matter.

title: Israel’s AI Czar Seeks Chip Fab, New Data Centers to Keep Edge
title_cn: 以色列人工智能沙皇寻求芯片工厂和新数据中心以保持优势
summary: Israel is seeking to build up its chipmaking and artificial intelligence infrastructure, courting large US and Asian semiconductor producers and planning a major expansion of its data center capacity to preserve the country’s regional technological leadership.

title: Samsung’s $400,000 Bonus Fuels Labor Disputes in South Korea
title_cn: 三星40万美元奖金引发韩国劳资纠纷
summary: Labor unions are rallying across South Korea after Samsung Electronics Co. caved in to protests and agreed to hand out bonuses of more than $400,000 to some of its employees.

title: Trump Says Saudi Nuclear Deal Subject to Forming Israel Ties
title_cn: 特朗普称沙特核协议取决于与以色列建立关系
summary: US President Donald Trump said a new civil nuclear agreement with Saudi Arabia depends on the kingdom normalizing ties with Israel, throwing cold water on a landmark deal his administration finalized just a day earlier.

title: Bolsonaro Denies New Links to Bank Scandal Ahead of Election
title_cn: 博尔索纳罗在选举前否认与银行丑闻有新联系
summary: Brazilian presidential candidate Flávio Bolsonaro denied fresh allegations of links to a major banking scandal after local media reported that his law firm received money from a consultant tied to Banco Master SA.

title: US Sees Haiti in Turmoil Ahead of Potential Deportations of TPS Holders
title_cn: 美国认为海地在可能被驱逐出境之前陷入混乱
summary: Haiti remains mired in a lawless miasma even as the US is threatening to force hundreds of thousands of people who fled the Caribbean nation back home, after the Supreme Court ruled that President Donald Trump can terminate their special immigration status.

title: Trump Threatens More Attacks on Iran After Houthis Join War
title_cn: 胡塞武装参战后特朗普威胁对伊朗发动更多袭击
summary: US President Donald Trump said he’ll hold Iran responsible for any further attacks by the Yemen-based Houthis on Red Sea ships, potentially widening Washington’s involvement in a Middle East war that shows no sign of abating.

title: US Public Pension Growth Climbs to Highest Peak Since 2008 Crash
title_cn: 美国公共养老金增长攀升至 2008 年经济崩溃以来的最高峰
summary: US public pension funding levels are projected to reach their highest point since the Global Financial Crisis, lifted by a soaring stock market and larger government contributions even as many plans remain vulnerable to a downturn.

title: Democrats Fret About Trump Using Heavy Hand With Elections
title_cn: 民主党人担心特朗普在选举中使用重拳
summary: Critics gameplan midterm scenarios if their worst fears unfold.

title: Kenya Court Rules Ruto’s Proposed Debt-Audit Panel Is Unlawful
title_cn: 肯尼亚法院裁定鲁托提议的债务审计小组非法
summary: A Kenyan court quashed President William Ruto’s appointment of a panel to conduct a forensic audit of the nation’s public debt, saying the plan is unconstitutional.

title: Lawmakers Worry Trump’s Team Isn’t Closing China Chip Curbs Gap They Created
title_cn: 立法者担心特朗普团队没有缩小他们造成的中国芯片限制差距
summary: US lawmakers are pressing President Donald Trump’s team to close a loophole they say the administration created in China tech restrictions, but which a key agency denies exists — an example of the persistent confusion surrounding Washington’s efforts to limit China’s AI prowess.

title: Bollywood to Sikh Temples Lend Support to India Gen Z Protests
title_cn: 宝莱坞和锡克教寺庙支持印度 Z 世代抗议
summary: Thousands of student protesters that have made headlines in India this week are drawing widespread support from a sympathetic public, who are flooding them with food donations and providing shelter and medical aid.

title: Candidates Line Up for the UN’s Thankless Top Job
title_cn: 候选人排队争夺联合国吃力不讨好的最高职位
summary: The contenders gather in New York today to present their views on restoring the UN to its heyday.

title: UK Chancellor Healey Vows Fiscal Buffer to Shield Economy From Shocks
title_cn: 英国财政大臣希利誓言财政缓冲将保护经济免受冲击
summary: Chancellor of the Exchequer John Healey committed to disciplined control of Britain’s public finances to protect against economic shocks, as he made a pro-business pitch to the City of London on his third full day in post.

title: Iran War: Houthis Open New Front in War By Targeting Ships in Red Sea
title_cn: 伊朗战争：胡塞武装瞄准红海船只开辟战争新战线
summary: The Iran-backed Houthis claimed their first attack on commercial ships in recent months, opening a new front in the US-Iran war that has already disrupted global energy supplies and rattled bond markets.

title: Trump Signs Nuclear Sharing Deal With Saudi Arabia in Policy Shift
title_cn: 特朗普与沙特阿拉伯签署核共享协议以实现政策转变
summary: The US and Saudi Arabia finalized a long-sought nuclear technology-sharing deal that could allow American companies to build reactors in the kingdom, but cracks the door open for the country to enrich its own nuclear reactor fuel.

title: India Restarts Visa Processing in Australia After 23-Day Disruption
title_cn: 印度在中断 23 天后重启澳大利亚签证处理
summary: India restarted passport, visa and other consular services across Australia on Thursday via outsourcing giant VFS Global, ending a 23-day freeze triggered by a legal dispute.

title: Japan’s Government Weighs Regulating Pokémon Cards Amid Trading Mania
title_cn: 日本政府在交易热潮中考虑监管神奇宝贝卡牌
summary: Japan, the home of Pokémon, is beginning to weigh regulating the booming trading card market, as values soaring into the millions of dollars fuel counterfeiting and money laundering.

title: Oil Firms Warn Madagascar Plan May Spark Trade in Russian Fuel
title_cn: 石油公司警告马达加斯加计划可能引发俄罗斯燃料贸易
summary: A group of companies including TotalEnergies SE warned that Madagascar’s plans to nationalize fuel imports could put them and their customers at risk of trading and using sanctioned oil.

title: Egypt Sees US-Iran Crisis ‘Bridgeable’ as It Pursues Mediation
title_cn: 埃及认为美伊危机“可以弥合”，并寻求调解
summary: Egypt sees a path for the US and Iran to de-escalate tensions after about two weeks of tit-for-tat attacks and resume peace talks, Foreign Minister Badr Abdelatty said, as Cairo pushes for a diplomatic solution along with key mediators.

title: China, Japan Top Envoys Talk for First Time Since Takaichi Row
title_cn: 中日特使高市事件后首次通话
summary: The foreign ministers of China and Japan met in person for the first time since their countries became locked in a dispute over Prime Minister Sanae Takaichi’s remarks on Taiwan.

title: China, Philippine Ships Clash Again Hours After Diplomats Meet
title_cn: 外交官会面数小时后，中国与菲律宾船只再次发生冲突
summary: China and the Philippines clashed for a second time this week in the disputed South China Sea, escalating tensions between the two nations even after a meeting between their top diplomats.

title: Houthis Say They Hit Tankers in Red Sea, Widening Iran War
title_cn: 胡塞武装称他们在红海袭击了油轮，扩大了伊朗战争
summary: The Houthis, a militant group in Yemen who have been threatening to open another front in the Iran war, said they had targeted two oil tankers in the Red Sea.
